statement: In every magma, Equation 1409 (`x = y * (((z * w) * y) * u)`) implies Equation 4205 (`x * y = ((z * x) * w) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0585
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z w) y) u))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op z x) w) z)
